title: A Place To Grow: MTU Biomedical Micro-Devices Lab Asks Simple Questions, Makes Big Connections
summary_en: From targeting cancer cells to engineering 3D tissue, Michigan Tech's Biomedical Micro-Devices Lab operates at the intersection of biology and precision engineering.
